case_title: TEHLIRIAN AVEDIS VS MILLER FRANK et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $829.00 FILED BY TEHLIRIAN AVEDIS AS TO DEFENDANT MILLER FRANK MILLER TINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-14-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
INVALID, TWO DEFT. ON ONE POS.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TEHLIRIAN AVEDIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MILLER FRANK MILLER TINA $162.40 PRINCIPAL, $33.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $195.40, NONE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
